debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Arch
state : SystemState
reqId : RequestId
thId : ThreadId
req_old : Request
req : Request := ⋯
requests' : RequestArray := ⋯
scope : Scope := ⋯
orderConstraints' : OrderConstraints := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed → id ∈ reqIds requests'

failed_attempts: λ id h => by simp [state.removedCoherent id h, *]

λ id h_rem h_in =>
        state.removedCoherent id h_rem <| match RequestArray.mem_insert_iff.mp h_in with
          | .inl h_eq => h_eq ▸ RequestArray.mem_of_getReq? (by assumption)
          | .inr h_mem => h_mem
λ id h => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert (state.removedCoherent id h)
fun id h => state.removedCoherent id h

by
        intro id h
        rw [requests']
        simp [state.removedCoherent id h]

by
        intro id h
        have := state.removedCoherent id h
        simp_all
λ id h => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert (state.removedCoherent id h)

λ id h => by
        simp [requests']
        right
        exact state.removedCoherent id h

by
        intro id h
        have := state.removedCoherent id h
        simp_all [Request.propagate]

by
        simp [requests', h]
        exact state.removedCoherent

by
        intro id h
        simp [requests']
        right
        exact state.removedCoherent id h
by intro id h; have := state.removedCoherent id h; simp [*]

by
        intro id h
        simp [requests', RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert, state.removedCoherent id h]
λ id h => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert.mpr (Or.inr (state.removedCoherent id h))

λ id h => by
        simp [reqIds, RequestArray.insert]
        right
        exact state.removedCoherent id h
λ id h => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert.mpr (Or.inr (state.removedCoherent id h))

fun id h => by
        simp [requests']
        try apply Or.inr
        exact state.removedCoherent id h

fun id h => by
          have := state.removedCoherent id h
          simp_all
fun id h => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert (state.removedCoherent id h)
λ id h => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert (state.removedCoherent id h)

by
        intro id hid
        rw [RequestArray.reqIds_insert]
        intro h_in
        cases h_in with
        | inl h_eq =>
          have : reqId ∈ state.requests.reqIds := RequestArray.mem_reqIds_of_getReq? h
          rw [h_eq, RequestArray.getReq?_id _ _ h] at hid
          exact state.removedCoherent _ hid this
        | inr h_old => exact state.removedCoherent id hid h_old
by simp [requests']; exact state.removedCoherent

by
        intro id h
        have := state.removedCoherent id h
        simp_all [requests']

λ id h => by
        rw [RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert]
        exact Or.inr (state.removedCoherent id h)

fun id h =>
        RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert.mpr (Or.inr (state.removedCoherent id h))

by
        intro id h
        simp [requests']
        exact state.removedCoherent id h
by simp [requests']; exact state.removedCoherent
fun id h => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert.mpr (Or.inr (state.removedCoherent id h))

by
        intro id h
        simp [RequestArray.reqIds_insert]
        right
        exact state.removedCoherent id h

by
        intro id h
        simp [requests', req]
        apply state.removedCoherent
        assumption
